synopsis:
Issue 2 of 4 from the Dark Horse Comics Hyperspace Stories Codebrecker miniseries
On a remote Outer Rim planet, Poe Dameron and BB-8 discover a First Order base where the enemy keeps their fabled codebreaker, used to crack secret Resistance messages. Can the two heroes infiltrate—and then escape—the high-security compound guarded by merciless Stormtrooper (First Order)stormtroopers? And what mysterious technology will they find inside?
title: Hyperspace Stories: Codebreaker #02
